description: CompositionBlack crew neck jersey made of 100% PES, with short sleeves and adidas logo on the chestWash CareHand wash or machine washFittingonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoThis black crew neck t-shirt from adidas suits men - young and old - alike. Short sleeved with an embossed Adidas logo, it's an ideal polo tee for Sports and fitness training at the neighbourhood gym or sports club. It's a great add to the wardrobe of college-goers and working folks and looks fabulous when teamed with denims for that casual leisurewear look. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in jerseysHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
